hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# OpenClawTrader Session Start Hook
# 加载上次会话的股票数据缓存

echo 'OpenClawTrader: Checking for cached stock data...'

CACHE_DIR='$HOME/openclaw/OpenClawTrader/.claude/memory'
SESSION_FILE="$CACHE_DIR/sessions/$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')-session.md"

if [ -f "$SESSION_FILE" ]; then
  echo "OpenClawTrader: Found session file from $(date -r "$SESSION_FILE" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')"
fi

SessionStart.description: Load cached stock data on session start

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# OpenClawTrader Session End Hook
# 保存当前会话状态和股票数据缓存

CACHE_DIR='$HOME/openclaw/OpenClawTrader/.claude/memory'
mkdir -p "$CACHE_DIR/sessions"

SESSION_FILE="$CACHE_DIR/sessions/$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')-session.md"

cat > "$SESSION_FILE" << 'EOF'
# Session: DATE_PLACEHOLDER

## Current State
[Auto-saved session state]

## Last Updated
TIME_PLACEHOLDER
EOF

sed -i "s/DATE_PLACEHOLDER/$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')/g" "$SESSION_FILE"
sed -i "s/TIME_PLACEHOLDER/$(date '+%H:%M:%S')/g" "$SESSION_FILE"

echo "OpenClawTrader: Session saved to $SESSION_FILE"

#!/bin/bash
# Log API calls with sanitized output

LOG_FILE='$HOME/openclaw/OpenClawTrader/.claude/memory/api-call.log'
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$LOG_FILE")"

# Extract and sanitize command for logging
echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] API Call attempted" >> "$LOG_FILE"

#!/bin/bash
# Post-build check for errors

BUILD_OUTPUT=$(cat /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null || echo '')

if echo "$BUILD_OUTPUT" | grep -qi "error:"; then
  echo "⚠️  Build completed with errors - review before proceeding"
fi
